## ProductionTools.ProcedureSelector() function

Procedure selector component with full CRUD support.

Provides selection from available procedures, with optional ability to add new procedures and remove existing ones from the options.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function ProcedureSelector({ state, actions, getProcedureName, onAddProcedure, showRemove, label, disabled }: IProcedureSelectorProps): React.ReactElement | null;
```

**Returns:**

React.ReactElement \| null

Procedure selector element

## Example


```tsx
const { state, actions } = useProcedureSelection({...});

<ProcedureSelector
  state={state}
  actions={actions}
  getProcedureName={(id) => runtime.getProcedure(id)?.name ?? id}
  onAddProcedure={() => setShowProcedurePicker(true)}
/>
```
